result: {"schema_version": 1, "pass": false, "review_status": "completed", "summary": "新 docstring 宣稱驗證 issuer，但程式碼未做 issuer 驗證", "issues": [{"severity": "major", "confidence": "high", "category": "consistency", "file": "services/auth.py", "line_hint": "L8-L11", "check": "docstring 寫 \"Verify a JWT token against the configured issuer\"，但 jwt.decode() 未傳入 issuer/options 參數，實際上沒有驗證 issuer", "verdict": "文件與行為不一致：下游開發者可能信賴 docstring 而略過 issuer 檢查，造成安全假設斷裂", "fix": "二擇一：(1) 在 jwt.decode 加上 issuer 驗證，例如 options={\"verify_iss\": True}, issuer=self.issuer；(2) 把 docstring 改為如實描述現有行為，移除 issuer 相關描述"}]}
